he2a87657g33edg46b0gb5bcg175420d72d43: You've tracked me down again, my friend. Would that I had as much luck with the beast I'm hunting.
h4b7c5f9fge786g43fcga896g288ecad2c7e7: What'll you do when you find the vampire? Kill him?
h2f052de2g5b9cg49e0g91cfg7725f5ea4cc8: Not this time. My orders are to capture him.
h6909c68bgaf50g4519gbb20gfaa7716ee651: Oh? And bring him where, exactly?
h4a103841gf37fg4b8eg8fabg2f90b2f0fe54: Baldur's Gate. My people wait for me there.
h72f83aceg3db8g40c4g8b00gea524147ee7d: I'm here to help. This is Astarion - the vampire you're hunting.
hb8518ef8g05deg40cfg8d7cgfdcbc82d5a76: You idiot. What have you done?
h9ad808f8g0c1bg478cg958ag9407eb86f255: I've delivered a monster to a monster hunter.
h76ace423g07d2g4d2eg911ag03f8a86c26aa: I thank you for your help. My people work to rid this world of evil - you are a friend to our cause.
h656e954ag57d3g499ag8d70g662943ca07e0: It's amazing you survived, travelling with a beast like that.
h6d283b43g8d54g469agb400ga6875bf81610: I have a cage ready nearby - it will hold him when he wakes.
hf28ecbc4g288ag4c02ga146g12782e274ae8: Thank you for this. And for cleansing this swamp of the hag. You have done good here today. Safe travels.
h5d11ddbfgc8d9g43aagb515g3a5dc2ed73e5: I would have made a deal with the hag to find this. I'm very glad that I did not. Thank you and safe travels.
h096397ebge33fg4980ga889g2fc12b6e2b58: I'll return him to my tribe, as ordered. Whatever fate awaits him there, I'm sure it is deserved.
hd8fa7755gb049g4229g9cd0g196f9291f5ca: Take the spawn, just leave his stuff with me.
h8ddb75bag21f2g43d8g970bg416763510ce1: It's yours. This is the only prize I need.
h42ff9cafgdbe3g40b6ga6b2gadaa877742d4: Relax, he's not taking you anywhere.
h4bd33aacg31f1g4a2cga4e1ge4cb67f5eefa: Moonmaiden's light upon you. And may she spare a little for me, too.
h1c1e1c13gf570g4ca5g8cb2gd9623ce0048d: The thing you hunt - it's my companion, Astarion. I didn't know what he was.
hee3347b9g0c34g427dga8d3ge38d733ed3cc: Ah, well. If you had, I could not fault you for lying - his kind have charm beyond our mortal means to resist.
h65bea61cg21f2g4102g9d41gf0b53db47c2c: Astarion's the monster you seek. I wanted to protect him before.
hcb0402eag8291g4105g9cdbgd36c4432e678: Go ahead. The lady of the house awaits.
hcd3e432fg00f7g4e89g9fddg1a5e97cc7ed9: If you'll forgive me, my friend - you have the stink of fey about you.
h00bd0a33g0becg44f6gbbeeg2577d27d52e2: You met with this Auntie Ethel, I take it. But did you pay her price?
hd8e15108gfbc6g4e26g986cg27c7cef0abdd: The only price paid was hers. She's dead.
hb112bf41ga056g4b38ga540g407d112cf6ae: Price? She was lucky to keep her life.
ha61b026cg90f2g46e7g92ebg047341bc9021: She made me an offer - but I refused.
h4b7c3dacgf222g4c47ga0f7g9a95da5e0283: Your wisdom does you credit. Mine, I'm afraid, is outweighed by need.
h5d56d588g5dc7g48d9g969fg5f428da6df1d: The thing I hunt has eluded me too long. The hag can have what she wants, so long as she helps me find him first.
h8c02fac6g6eb9g434fg867fg9a635e5b1258: I bid you fair fortune on the road. Though you seem the type to make your own.
h876ac42cgbbadg4706ga461ga8b58d262ad7: I won't pry - not when I have need of her myself.
h15ec3390gbaacg4b77gba5bg11e2da989c02: Ah, a fellow wanderer. Forgive the aroma.
h7b16908ag55afg4e34gbe3fg47bc11d6341c: *You catch a waft of something foul - metallic and sickly-sweet.*
hf3655470g0717g4608g9ff4gfaa3557bcaba: Powdered iron-vine. Most monsters will think twice before making a meal of me.
h6ead373dg2ecfg4470gb829ge851905d1478: An old hunter's trick - if you can't mask your scent, spoil it.
h2bb0e519g7c85g412eg96b0gb567de1096d9: Today? The same as you - a humble supplicant, come to bargain with the lady of this house.
h99125a34ge390g46d9g8079ga723c2ca8314: I prefer a weapon to a stench, thanks.
hfafcc71bg9429g4ea2gad12g01fab3919db4: Sharp steel is not proof against all the monsters of this world, my friend.
hd767156cg4a27g467bg96dag25dc83462c47: A sharp wit will serve you better, if you're to bargain with the lady of this house.
h99829da0g0a59g4a8eg9438g36ecee880fa6: Though... perhaps I speak too swiftly. You have an odour of your own.
ha82ef9e3g0203g4bc8gbcb6gdb29022e039d: The stench of fey blood. You've already met the hag, then?
h9e68e1degbd94g4b63gb854g01687d999ff3: I have. She didn't survive the encounter.
h2805973dg5fd1g4363gacdcgc96c4ba43b51: Truly? I won't mourn her passing, though I hoped she would help me on my hunt.
h9396a2b8g4b99g491agb905gd00ce8ea44c1: I can wait. You, on the other hand, should already be running. Her coven will hear of this.
h564cfe6dgc798g48edg9825gb9dcf7c0260c: They'll stop plotting to kill one another just long enough to focus all that energy on you, instead.
h5a2a2550gce0dg4903g8c42gf2a90f7b0ea8: Courage has played its part in this story, my friend. Caution will see you live to tell it.
h669541f8gaa02g47acg8172g143951220666: Selûne's light go with you. I fear you will need it, to face what is coming.
h37d1c76bg9448g447bg9ae3g7cb166969540: I did - but I let her keep her life.
h2dbe67acgc994g466eg8499ga1b83c602d46: Honourable, but unwise. Her kind don't share your forgiving nature.
hef0f0669g7b8bg449ag999ag43ea84527023: I hoped she might help me on my hunt - but I have no desire to be the first face she sees after yours.
h2d9ed4e7g6bf8g47bfg9b0bgeaf7f480e72e: I'll have to find my quarry by more traditional means. But, one hunter to another - well done.
h8facca3dg7403g462ag97ceg6045717acb2e: Little enough - I hoped she might help me on my hunt, but I suppose she's... indisposed.
hdb02d4c9g7ebbg491egb899g1b199d71b8a5: That is why you come to her lair, I take it? To bargain?
h744260ecgb4fdg4d94g96ccgb3b7ea1c9d9e: Are you talking about Auntie Ethel?
h4ff37ef3ga75ag4a16g89ffgf49d00688280: A gentle name. But I speak of her nature.
h5ed9db8fga009g48d8g86bfgcd8480830886: Her kind have hidden among us since the first darkness - and their knowledge is matched only by their spite.
h9aab6070g779fg4f0eg9ff1gafff739f29a7: Know how to ask, and they'll share that knowledge. If you're fool enough to pay their price.
h861c4e91gf2d1g445fga880gd3a1dbe6e334: A powerful friend. A terrible foe. That, I cannot decide for you.
hb98e7953geb17g433eg9d6eg5ff9b3a1cc40: For my part - I need her knowledge. The thing I hunt has gone to ground.
h6135e699g6f29g4fe0g95f2g3e48d1868cca: Of course. I'm a hunter who lost his prey, and here I am seeking help from something worse.
hccee5cf3g4704g42d2ga6cfg89efeb018ce0: But she thrives on suffering. Once she hears what awaits my quarry when I catch him, she will help.
he18422c2ge793g4ed1ga36fg1695885dc9c2: Truth is like a blade, my friend. We can arm ourselves with it.
h6b2c00d2g4537g4a9cgbdaeg2fe621ff69f5: Or just as easily find it pressed against our throat. I would not put you in danger.
h2d2b8a62g3843g4f82gb69bg91395c9e31d9: There's enough deception in this place - don't add to it.
h4cb042c7g8ba5g44e3ga902g28bc226a3a76: It is not everyone who can see past her parlour tricks. As you wish - the truth is not mine to keep.
hd9a7f11ag2cdeg469fgaf6bgcc744f89c2e4: Maybe I can help with your hunt.
hf84d231ag511bg4e4dg90degbfe703f2227b: No. This duty is mine alone. But for such an offer, an answer at least is owed.
h3651fdf8g68feg4372g8261g754db53f3cf2: A kind offer - but to accept it would be no kindness at all, I assure you.
hae431a58g080ag4901gb8a8g3387a84a3797: You've done your part in dealing with the hag. Now, my own hunt must continue.
hb3a6147fg3591g43b7ga46fg188b9fe0991a: Besides - first I must survive what waits in that house. One terror at a time, hm?
hd195106fg0a7eg4426g8da0g12a921a4e74f: Come now - I've almost certainly killed worse.
h7b5b61e7gb004g48dbg8c2cg88f8e6e6f8c5: I would not be so sure. But I won't keep the truth from you.
h817912a6gcf1bg463dg9e14g2b7ba7cd5e15: I hunt a vampire spawn named Astarion. I'm bound to bring him back to Baldur's Gate - alive.
habd13ebbg95e2g49a9g9565ge03e3a4d822a: Though I cannot swear to his condition once my tribe are done with him. Is he known to you?
ha46dbecagcbc8g400cga0ddgdb3135e102d4: I know Astarion - he's no vampire.
h932327f9g90cdg4b32gae66g170ad4b10d3c: So you have met him. His kind have charm beyond our mortal means to resist.
h07996ddagab61g4b2egb0b4gb3d7dae7dbbd: But you're right - he's no true vampire. Not yet. I don't suppose you'll tell me where he is?
he0665ccfg0633g46c5gaf1fg6c0b21a74a50: Tell him how to find your camp.
h6c7b09edgf5b4g45d5gb44ag41c52ca4e9a2: A wise decision. I will do my work - and for what it is worth, I will take no pleasure in it.
hef6e4a76gcabeg4457g98d7g446945874c6b: I bid you good fortune with the lady of the house.
h7206ef65ga83cg45d2gadd6g25c70fd67aae: I honestly don't know where he is.
h098e7817g52c3g4e54g9b12gc8f805ba604e: ... as you say. Then I must redouble my efforts, and pray my delay costs no more lives.
hcbf8d12dg17d8g40c9g8efag95ad3b17fbba: I'm not going to help you find him. Back off.
h5ebcb0f4gb301g44a9g98ddgb93f9055d118: Astarion has quite the friend in you. I'll make sure he knows that, at the end.
hdb8fdcd4g06a3g48a7gbef2gde447e4674ff: We've met - he's not the type to come quietly.
h0d5221a8g03eag42c2gacb5g5986891dea25: You do know him? I don't suppose you'll tell me where he is?
hd2ce89e1g7812g4a09g8804gb23d63354a3d: Or so I'm told. With the hag gone, I shall have to wait a while longer to see for myself.
hce5bad70gf17cg4265gb31fg2b075751b46a: But best to take one terror at a time, hm? I've used enough of your time - the lady awaits.
h9d17e639g891eg402fg8923gcb72cae82cf6: You can give up your hunt. Astarion's under my protection.
h4352f496g625fg40ceg9690g6021b77a093f: ...I see. Your loyalty is admirable but misplaced. His kind have charm beyond our mortal means to resist.
h790e3ca5gda37g45cbga73dg4b432311707b: I can show you who he truly is - if you will just tell me where to find him.
hec9277bag8636g4b60g87d4gbbdd809675d2: You're wasting your time. Astarion's already dead.
h15f1a474g831dg463dg83acg294892e2bd13: You know him? Not too well, I think, if you believe he is so easily slain. He could be stalking your camp at this very moment.
hb83db5c5ga22cg4000ga77fgbf11ca6d3b1d: Perhaps you could tell me where to look, and I could ensure peace of mind for us both?
h70b14816g3531g4dacg908dg92dbc160ed2a: Without doubt. But this is a personal quarry - one hunter to another, I'm sure you understand.
hd9beb24bg78aag4382g833eg94e4a29c726f: Your coyness is getting boring. Tell me.
h39e7184cg27f4g43cfg93d2g1ec28ebf65b3: You take insult where none is intended, my friend. But fine - I won't add to it.
h9ae11900gb9cdg4a59g9f4fg99b9d09f84de: I do not think that I will.
hfb0f9029g92a8g4375ga10ega078bc9c461f: You made a fine kill today, my friend - content yourself with that.
h51d4ade4gfd96g4084gb043gf82b1d571a7b: Questions are free - answers are not. Better to learn that before you meet the lady of the house.
h048ed0b9g1641g43d2gaeaeg4c5f2c137892: Questions should never bring you regret, my friend. Answers are another matter.
h4b5c8fb3g0522g4689g8c87g8561fa616861: Any advice on how to deal with her?
h2ccf9738g941bg47e8g80b7g0cd8dbae281c: Scream. Turn. Run the other way - that's what I'd like to say.
h490eaa1eg04a3g4554g947eg4c57b6c49c59: But bad as she is, I'm betting whatever drove you to her door is worse.
h387ac84bg1d2eg4193g8702gd9ec5f385f69: So instead: know you're outmatched. Know what you're willing to give. And mind your manners.
h4e7e6119gf280g4dadgb751g5d63ecc10968: Ah - so you did. I thought you were just squinting from the stink.
hc1275b1ag7229g4d60gb1c0gfef3c6039941: But, one fool to another, I can't say I judge you. The thing I hunt has slipped away from me.
h73e239bag25cdg4aa3ga1f7g8f152600aec3: If she can tell me how to flush him out, I'll pay whatever price she asks.
hed8a7bf7g2c7fg44a5g9687g8de3d25d4142: Speak for yourself - I got what I wanted.
hd77bd0e3g5b0cg423bgaae3g8a43fd54cd66: So said the fish 'round the hook in its mouth.
hdfd1f5a0g2a3bg42feg8ef7g98e3e9cd168b: Whatever's easiest to lose and hardest to do without.
hd4373baag8954g4b74g838cg966e5a4bee84: But the thing I hunt has gone to ground. If she can tell me how to draw him out, I'll pay whatever she asks.
hc9a0c477g6639g4769g8d79ge3ec78bd34b9: I know Ethel - that sounds nothing like her.
ha8a925d8geccag4444gb518g24d26d634754: I hope this Ethel is waiting for you when you walk through that door. But I suspect you'll find something else.
h3caf3237g561ag4c50ga28bg3ea3a627f67b: I think you're mistaken - this place looks innocent enough.
hfc315fc4g1efdg4653g8badg3715af2da3a5: That would be nice. I'd welcome a proper cup of tea.
h49870417gddc7g4974g8342gb5c8a514e21d: But I'm not wrong. Take her lightly, and she'll serve up your eyes for appetisers.
ha5e087adg6cbag4cfcg8960g06ee71d73b29: I'll eat them, too. I need her knowledge - the thing I hunt has gone to ground.
heb189ba5gcfc8g4940ga0aagf37712d45793: A more innocent name than some I could I call her. But it is what she is that ought to concern you.
he79c0ab9g7d2eg4185g8966gd353c95f1613: Because this is her domain. If you are here, it is because it suits her.
h9d7d7c52gc678g488fg8ff0gc9baae27a962: It's a teahouse - hardly a lair.
h055a4fa0g6800g4137gaf81g48bd42e1d4ca: A charming sight, to be sure. But the prettiest web still has a spider sitting at its centre.
ha8197f20gab5cg4c07gbf23g32a2b5c72125: Not at all. I was invited for tea.
h03c0ecd5g32d2g4ddagbe60gb2163db86ae3: Of course - as the spider invites the fly. You need something, I expect. And she sensed it.
hb08970a0gc13ag4a90ga675g5b8a31d11b3f: Not much of a bargain. She made an offer - I refused.
hdf62bba4g4c39g4a3cg9b61gae2fc7ed87ae: Truly? Then you know what she is - what she can do.
h71903aa9g85f9g4cd7g977fg866836b3937f: You're wise to walk away. But I cannot - the thing I hunt has gone to ground.
h753a9270g5107g4b26g929ag59af6778f5e5: My business here is my own.
h9f66b4fcgdc76g4bc7g8e42gf2f4ed81b2c7: As you like. But you needn't be coy - whatever's worth knowing, rest assured she already knows it.
h01a3a7dfgda96g425agbd45ge9a0df268953: You're a monster hunter? Not what I imagined.
he62f5ac3gfe17g4a66g9ab3gb8dc0762f2ce: Hah. Perhaps that is why I have survived so long where more fearsome peers have not.
h7649304fg59a1g4fc8g999dgc10b5e3db65c: You would be wise to look past the seeming of things, if you intend to bargain with the lady of this house.
hb4d548c3gd411g43b7gad21g4adc61439640: We share a profession, it seems. I'm Wyll - better known as the Blade of Frontiers.
h0b49127aga81ag4d71gb1b5g1d90847acd13: Ah, the Blade of Frontiers! You wield that reputation as deftly as a blade itself.
he55c5a88g7bd1g4b16g8ee8g7a580673c5a5: Your name should serve you well when you meet with the lady of this house.
ha868205cg4ff2g40cag8114g70309711b029: Whatever you're hunting, your stench alone will kill it.
h69462f91g52f0g4426g9461g07c7ad9570f3: Hah! A quick wit is rare indeed. Good manners, however, all beings can aspire to.
h8ce62d73gfbccg4a26g91e8g1fb1bd90c9d5: I suggest you find yours before dealing with the lady of this house.
